label: s22-ultra-reference
prompt: A clean studio product reference photo of a single Phantom Black Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra Android smartphone, shown as TWO views side by side on a plain pure-white seamless background. LEFT: the FRONT view, a large 6.8-inch display turned on, with very subtly curved left and right screen edges, slim symmetrical bezels, and a single small centered punch-hole front camera at the top. RIGHT: the BACK view in matte black glass with NO rectangular camera bump module; instead four separate individual circular camera lenses arranged in a vertical column down the upper-left edge, with a small LED flash and sensor beside the top lens, a subtle SAMSUNG wordmark centered lower, and the squared-off boxy corners characteristic of the S22 Ultra. Both phones upright and parallel, accurate true-to-life proportions, even soft studio lighting, sharp high-detail commercial product photography, no text labels, no watermarks, no hands.

label: s22-ultra-reference-v2-accurate-back
prompt: A clean studio product reference photo of a single Phantom Black Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra Android smartphone, shown as TWO views side by side on a plain pure-white seamless background. LEFT: the FRONT view, a large 6.8-inch display turned on with a vivid abstract wallpaper, very subtly curved left and right screen edges, slim symmetrical bezels, and a single small centered punch-hole front camera at the top. RIGHT: the BACK view in Phantom Black matte glass with squared boxy corners, using the signature Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra contour-cut camera design where each lens rises directly out of the glass with NO rectangular camera module: in the upper-left, the TOP camera lens has a small LED flash and a tiny red laser-autofocus sensor immediately to its right; below the top lens, three more separate circular camera lenses of varying sizes are stacked in a vertical column (the largest is the main camera), each lens with a metallic ring and faint blue-teal glass reflection; a centered 'SAMSUNG' wordmark in the lower third. Both phones upright and parallel, accurate true-to-life proportions, even soft studio lighting, sharp high-detail commercial product photography, no hands, no extra text, no watermarks.

label: s22-ultra-reference-v3-from-real-photo

LEFT: the FRONT view of the same phone, a large 6.8-inch display turned on with a vivid abstract wallpaper, very subtly curved left/right edges, slim symmetrical bezels, and a single centered punch-hole front camera at the top. Both phones upright and parallel, accurate true-to-life proportions, even soft studio lighting, sharp high-detail commercial product photography, no hands, no text overlays, no watermarks.

label: handheld-mic
prompt: A professional handheld dynamic interview microphone, matte black body with a charcoal foam windscreen ball, held upright, product reference photograph on a plain light-gray studio background, centered, sharp focus, no hands, no people, no text or logos. Clean prop reference shot.
